subject: [PATCH 10/14] nfsd: add new netlink spec for svc_export upcall

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's complexity and potential impact on performance, suggesting a more incremental approach to implementing netlink support for NFSd.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series adds a new netlink specification for NFSd to handle svc_export upcalls, including definitions and attribute sets for cache notify, RPC status, file system location, authentication flavor, and service export requests.
